source_pr.title: executor,bootstrap: add `tidb_index_usage` table and `cluster_tidb_index_usage` table
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #50823

### What changed and how does it work?

1. Create new tables `information_schema.tidb_index_usage` + `cluster_tidb_index_usage`

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

```release-note
Add new tables `information_schema.tidb_index_usage` and `information_schema.cluster_tidb_index_usage` to show the index usage statistics information.
```

fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: order by table_name, index_name;`, tableName)) (pkg/infoschema/test/clustertablestest/cluster_tables_test.go)
